headline: General Motors Balances Engine Investment And F1 Cadillac With Valuation Upside
summary: General Motors (NYSE:GM) is committing substantial new capital to gasoline V8 engine and 10 speed transmission production in North America, reinforcing its internal combustion portfolio alongside electric vehicles. The company also announced a limited edition Cadillac CT5-V Blackwing F1 Collector Series to mark Cadillac's entry into Formula 1. These moves combine fresh manufacturing investment with motorsport focused branding, highlighting GM's commitment to both traditional performance...

headline: Fewer features, more value: Why some Americans are buying simpler cars
summary: Cloth seats, manual controls and analog gauges are back as buyers look for cars with sticker prices closer to $30,000.

raw.headline: Fewer features, more value: Why some Americans are buying simpler cars

headline: Detroit carmakers warn of $5 billion commodities shock due to Iran war
summary: Detroit carmakers have warned that the financial hit from higher commodity prices will rise to $5bn this year as the Middle East war strains...
